text: There we go. Do you remember I spying a gas station at the bottom of the mountain? I don't think so. But you're about to spy it now, because there it is! Arth has arrived! Thanks, Arthur. But we still have to get home, and we still don't know how to get there. Maybe if you remember anything else you spied, I can fly around until I see him. It's hard to remember. I mean, I started out spying Pagey, and then spying a picture of guinea pig on.
